Content Switcher

Segmented control / toggle group for switching between related content views using <lyte-tabs> Slyte DOM. Variants: Fill, Fill Minimal, 2/3/4 Segments, Button Type, Disabled across 4 sizes (XS/SM/MD/LG).

Navigation Figma 2630:5644 2 Styles × 3 Counts × 4 Sizes
Fill — All Sizes
Large (40px)
Base / MD (36px)
Small (32px)
Extra Small (26px)
HTML
<!-- Fill: Large -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-lg">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>Overview</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Details</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Settings</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>
      <lyte-tab-content>Overview content</lyte-tab-content>
      <lyte-tab-content>Details content</lyte-tab-content>
      <lyte-tab-content>Settings content</lyte-tab-content>
    </lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>

<!-- Fill: Base (MD) — use zc-content-switcher-md -->
<!-- Fill: Small — use zc-content-switcher-sm -->
<!-- Fill: Extra Small — use zc-content-switcher-xs -->
SCSS
.zc-content-switcher lyte-tab-head {
  background: #EBEBEB;
  border: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 4px;
}
.zc-content-switcher-fill lyte-tab-title.lyteTabActive {
  background: #0D4EF2;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
}

/* Sizes: xs=26px, sm=32px, md=36px, lg=40px */
.zc-content-switcher-xs lyte-tab-title { padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 12px; }
.zc-content-switcher-sm lyte-tab-title { padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; }
.zc-content-switcher-md lyte-tab-title { padding: 5px 14px; font-size: 14px; }
.zc-content-switcher-lg lyte-tab-title { padding: 7px 16px; font-size: 14px; }
Fill — Hover & Active States
Default
HTML
<!-- Hover on Default: inactive text #696C74 → #6C6D71 -->
<!-- Hover on Active (Fill): #0D4EF2 → #0B44D5 -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>First</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Second</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Third</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>
Fill Minimal — All Sizes
Large (40px)
Base / MD (36px)
Small (32px)
Extra Small (26px)
HTML
<!-- Fill Minimal: Large -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-minimal zc-content-switcher-lg">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>Overview</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Details</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Settings</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>

<!-- Fill Minimal: Base (MD) — use zc-content-switcher-md -->
<!-- Fill Minimal: Small — use zc-content-switcher-sm -->
<!-- Fill Minimal: Extra Small — use zc-content-switcher-xs -->
SCSS
.zc-content-switcher-minimal lyte-tab-head {
  background: #EBEBEB;
  border: 1px solid #D5D6D9;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 4px;
}
.zc-content-switcher-minimal lyte-tab-title.lyteTabActive {
  background: #E7EDFE;       /* light blue from Figma */
  color: #0D4EF2;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
}
2 Segments
Fill
Minimal
HTML
<!-- 2 Segments -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>Day</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Week</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>
3 Segments
Fill
Minimal
HTML
<!-- 3 Segments -->
<lyte-tabs ... class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md">
  ...
    <lyte-tab-title>Day</lyte-tab-title>
    <lyte-tab-title>Week</lyte-tab-title>
    <lyte-tab-title>Month</lyte-tab-title>
  ...
</lyte-tabs>
4 Segments
Fill
Minimal
HTML
<!-- 4 Segments -->
<lyte-tabs ... class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md">
  ...
    <lyte-tab-title>Day</lyte-tab-title>
    <lyte-tab-title>Week</lyte-tab-title>
    <lyte-tab-title>Month</lyte-tab-title>
    <lyte-tab-title>Year</lyte-tab-title>
  ...
</lyte-tabs>
Button Type — Fill, All Sizes
Large
Base (MD)
Small
Extra Small
HTML
<!-- Button Type with Icons -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-button zc-content-switcher-md">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>
        <span class="zc-cs-icon"><svg>...</svg></span> List
      </lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>
        <span class="zc-cs-icon"><svg>...</svg></span> Grid
      </lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>
SCSS
.zc-content-switcher-button lyte-tab-title {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.zc-cs-icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: 16px; height: 16px;
}
.zc-cs-icon svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
Button Type — Fill Minimal, All Sizes
Large
Base (MD)
Small
Extra Small
HTML
<!-- Button Type — Fill Minimal -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-minimal zc-content-switcher-button zc-content-switcher-md">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title><span class="zc-cs-icon"><svg>...</svg></span> List</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title><span class="zc-cs-icon"><svg>...</svg></span> Grid</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>
Disabled — Fill & Minimal (Before Selection)
Fill Disabled
Minimal Disabled
HTML
<!-- Disabled (before selection): Add zc-content-switcher-disabled -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md zc-content-switcher-disabled">
  ...
</lyte-tabs>

<!-- Disabled After (with active): Add zc-content-switcher-disabled-after -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md zc-content-switcher-disabled-after">
  ...
</lyte-tabs>
SCSS
.zc-content-switcher-disabled {
  pointer-events: none;
}
.zc-content-switcher-disabled lyte-tab-title {
  color: #A1A2A4;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
.zc-content-switcher-disabled.zc-content-switcher-fill
  lyte-tab-title.lyteTabActive {
  background: #A1A2A4;
  color: #FFFFFF;
}
.zc-content-switcher-disabled-after {
  pointer-events: none;
}
.zc-content-switcher-disabled-after lyte-tab-title {
  color: #A1A2A4;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
Disabled After — Fill & Minimal (With Active Selection)
Fill Disabled After
Minimal Disabled After
HTML
<!-- Disabled After: active segment + disabled switcher -->
<lyte-tabs lt-prop-height="auto" class="zc-content-switcher zc-content-switcher-fill zc-content-switcher-md zc-content-switcher-disabled-after">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="tabYield">
    <lyte-tab-head>
      <lyte-tab-title>Overview</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Details</lyte-tab-title>
      <lyte-tab-title>Settings</lyte-tab-title>
    </lyte-tab-head>
    <lyte-tab-body>...</lyte-tab-body>
  </template>
</lyte-tabs>
